description: Sample project extension registry. Declares namespaced custom component types so agents can resolve them without guessing. Core types stay snake_case; extensions use team:component.

components.name: acme:metric_sparkline
components.description: Compact inline trend chart for a single KPI. Leaf node — renders its own series, no children.

components.name: acme:insight_card
components.description: Branded card that frames an analytics insight. Container — holds a heading, a metric, and an acme:metric_sparkline.

implementations.notes: Preserve the component's built-in padding and focus treatment; pass Blueprint children through the default slot.
